title: Navigate between main modules and verify active content updates
description: Ensures the global navigation lets users move between key modules and each destination shows its primary content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view test suites
Click the link to view results
Verify evaluation results content is displayed

title: Navigate to Models module from dashboard
description: Verifies the global navigation can take the user to the models module and primary content loads.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view models
Verify a models list or models overview content is displayed

title: Navigate to Playground module from dashboard
description: Verifies the global navigation can take the user to the playground and the interactive area loads.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the playground
Verify the playground interactive content is displayed

title: Navigate to Settings module from dashboard
description: Verifies the global navigation can take the user to settings and settings content loads.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open settings
Verify application settings content is displayed

title: Navigate to Community module from dashboard
description: Verifies the global navigation can take the user to community features and the page loads primary content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open community
Verify community content is displayed

title: Submit a prompt in the playground and see a response
description: Verifies a user can enter a prompt, select a model, submit, and see a generated response appear.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Fill a short prompt into the prompt input
Select an available model from the model selector
Submit the prompt
Verify a model response is displayed in the playground

title: Playground shows an error when submitting without a prompt
description: Verifies the playground prevents submission when the prompt is empty and surfaces a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Ensure the prompt input is empty
Select an available model from the model selector
Submit the prompt
Verify a prompt validation error is visible

title: Playground prevents submission when no model is selected
description: Verifies the playground requires a model selection before a prompt can be submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Fill a short prompt into the prompt input
Clear the model selection if a model is preselected
Submit the prompt
Verify a model selection validation error is visible

title: Playground response updates when submitting a second prompt
description: Verifies a user can run multiple prompts sequentially and see the latest response update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Select an available model from the model selector
Fill the prompt input with First prompt for TC004
Submit the prompt
Fill the prompt input with Second prompt for TC004
Submit the prompt
Verify the latest displayed response corresponds to the most recent prompt submission

title: Playground allows long prompt entry without breaking submission
description: Verifies the prompt input accepts a longer prompt and submission still produces a response.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Select an available model from the model selector
Fill a long multi-sentence prompt into the prompt input
Submit the prompt
Verify a model response is displayed in the playground

title: Playground can be loaded directly and shows primary controls
description: Verifies the playground page loads and the primary prompt and model controls are present.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Verify the prompt input is visible
Verify the model selector is visible

title: Start a suite run and observe the live execution pipeline, then navigate to results to replay
description: Verifies the end-to-end workflow of starting a run from suite, seeing live pipeline updates, then replaying from results.

steps.description: Navigate to /suite
Start a run
Verify a live execution pipeline visualization is displayed
Click the navigation to view results
Select the most recent run
Start pipeline replay
Verify the pipeline visualization is displayed during replay

title: Suite page loads and allows starting a run
description: Verifies the suite page loads its primary run action and the user can initiate execution.

steps.description: Navigate to /suite
Start a run
Verify live run status updates are displayed

title: Live pipeline shows progress indicators during a run
description: Verifies that starting a run results in observable pipeline status/progress updates in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /suite
Start a run
Wait for pipeline updates to appear
Verify at least one pipeline step shows a non-idle status

title: Replay controls are available on a run details view
description: Verifies that a completed run can be opened in results and exposes a replay capability for the pipeline visualization.

steps.description: Navigate to /results
Select a completed run
Verify pipeline replay controls are visible
Verify a pipeline visualization area is displayed

title: Results dashboard shows charts for a selected completed run and allows JSON export
description: Verifies selecting a completed run displays key charts and enables exporting results as JSON.

steps.description: Navigate to /results
Select a completed run
Verify radar chart data is displayed
Verify heatmap and score distribution data are displayed
Open the export options
Choose JSON export
Verify an export output preview or confirmation is visible

title: Incomplete run shows partial data and disables export
description: Verifies selecting an incomplete run shows partial/limited results and the export option is not available.

steps.description: Navigate to /results
Select an incomplete run
Verify partial results data is displayed
Verify export is disabled or unavailable

title: Results page loads and lists available runs
description: Verifies the results page loads and presents a list or selector of runs to view.

steps.description: Navigate to /results
Verify a list or selector of runs is displayed

title: Switching between two runs updates the dashboard data
description: Verifies selecting a different run updates the displayed charts/metrics accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /results
Select a completed run
Capture the currently displayed run identifier or title shown on the page
Select a different completed run
Verify the displayed run identifier or title changes to the newly selected run

title: Export menu presents multiple export formats
description: Verifies the export UI offers multiple formats to the user on a completed run.

steps.description: Navigate to /results
Select a completed run
Open the export options
Verify multiple export format options are displayed

title: Save Settings changes (Ollama URL and scoring weights)
description: Verifies that updating settings values can be saved and a success confirmation is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /settings
Fill a valid Ollama URL into the Ollama connection URL field
Adjust at least one scoring weight value to a different valid value
Submit the settings form to save changes
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Prevent saving cloud judge provider without API key
description: Verifies validation blocks saving when a cloud judge provider is selected without providing an API key.

steps.description: Navigate to /settings
Select a cloud judge provider in the judge configuration section
Ensure the API key field is empty
Submit the settings form to save changes
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify settings are not saved

title: Reject invalid Ollama URL format
description: Verifies an invalid Ollama URL cannot be saved and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /settings
Fill an invalid URL into the Ollama connection URL field
Submit the settings form to save changes
Verify a URL validation error is visible

title: Reject out-of-range scoring weights
description: Verifies scoring weights outside allowed range trigger validation and block saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /settings
Fill an out-of-range value into a scoring weight field
Submit the settings form to save changes
Verify a scoring weight validation error is visible

title: Settings page loads primary configuration sections
description: Verifies the settings page renders core sections needed to configure integrations and scoring.

steps.description: Navigate to /settings
Verify Ollama connection settings are displayed
Verify judge provider configuration is displayed

title: Import a public suite from Community into local Suites
description: Verifies importing a community shared suite results in the suite being available in the local suites page.

steps.description: Navigate to /community
Browse the list of shared suites
Select a public shared suite card
Trigger import of the selected suite into local suites
Click the link to view local suites
Verify the imported suite is displayed in the suites list

title: Show import error for incompatible or invalid community suite
description: Verifies that attempting to import a suite that is incompatible or invalid shows an import error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /community
Browse shared suites to find one marked as incompatible or invalid
Trigger import of the selected suite
Verify an import error is visible
Verify the suite is not added to local suites

title: Community page loads shared suites and result cards
description: Verifies the community browser page shows its primary browsing content.

steps.description: Navigate to /community
Verify shared suites are displayed
Verify shared result cards are displayed

title: Import cancel or dismiss does not add suite
description: Verifies that canceling out of an import flow does not change local suites.

steps.description: Navigate to /community
Select a public shared suite card
Start the import flow for the selected suite
Cancel or dismiss the import confirmation step
Click the link to view local suites
Verify the selected community suite was not added to the suites list
